SELECT
PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT 
,DV_MEASURE_NAME               
,BK_MEASURE_NAME               
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      
,100 RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT   
,'R'DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG            
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,SRC_ENTITY_NAME               
,BK_DEAL_ID                    
,ERP_DEAL_ID                   
,BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT        
,SERVICE_FLG                   
,0 RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT
, 0 BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT
,0  PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT
,0 PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT
,Current_Timestamp(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
  ,Current_Timestamp(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
  ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD
,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,DV_PRODUCT_KEY  
,0  DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT
, SUM(DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT)   DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT
,0 REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT
,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,POB_TYPE_CD                   
,PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG      
,0  DEFERRAL_REV_USD_AMT 
,DV_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY                                 
,CASE WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('MS','MS_BP') THEN 'SMT_MAPPING'
WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('MS_ENTSKU') THEN 'SMT_ENT_SKU'
WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('SOL_BKGS_POS',
'SOL_BKGS_NEG',
'DVSOL_BK_POS',
'DVSOL_BK_NEG',
'SOL_BKGS_LEFT') THEN 'BOOKINGS_SOL_MAPPING'
WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('GSP_BE_PID') THEN 'GSP_MAPPING'
WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('$20 RANGE') THEN '$20 RANGE'
WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('UNASSIGNED') THEN 'UNASSIGNED' 
WHEN RECORD_TYPE IN ('ACQ') THEN 'ACQ'
END AS   DV_TSS_ALLCTN_METHOD_TYPE

FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DR_CCW_SR_BRD_TRN_TSS_FT16 WI

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_FIN_DFREV_TSS_ENT_SKU ENT_SKU 
ON WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT=ENT_SKU.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT
AND WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=ENT_SKU.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME=ENT_SKU.BK_MEASURE_NAME
AND WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ENT_SKU.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND WI.PRODUCT_KEY=ENT_SKU.PRODUCT_KEY
AND WI.SERVICE_FLG=ENT_SKU.SERVICE_FLG
AND WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=ENT_SKU.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND WI.DV_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY=ENT_SKU.DV_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
AND WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=ENT_SKU.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY,DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN 
           GROUP BY 1,2,3)RPFIN 
 ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=WI.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND RPFIN.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
